steps.title: Subtract the constant
steps.content:
Start with $6p+144=222$. Subtract $144$ from both sides:
$$6p=78$$

steps.title: Check quickly
steps.content:
Substitute $p=13$ back into the original equation:
$$6(13)+144=78+144=222$$
So it satisfies the equation exactly. This also rules out larger choices, which would make the left side greater than $222$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: $p=13$, which matches Choice A — $13$. Therefore A is correct.
